Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.variable.type

Interface PrimitiveValueType

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable, ValueType
All Known Implementing Classes:
JsonTypeImpl, PrimitiveValueTypeImpl, PrimitiveValueTypeImpl.BooleanTypeImpl, PrimitiveValueTypeImpl.BytesTypeImpl, PrimitiveValueTypeImpl.DateTypeImpl, PrimitiveValueTypeImpl.DoubleTypeImpl, PrimitiveValueTypeImpl.IntegerTypeImpl, PrimitiveValueTypeImpl.LongTypeImpl, PrimitiveValueTypeImpl.NullTypeImpl, PrimitiveValueTypeImpl.NumberTypeImpl, PrimitiveValueTypeImpl.ShortTypeImpl, PrimitiveValueTypeImpl.StringTypeImpl, XmlTypeImpl
public interface PrimitiveValueType extends ValueType
Since:
7.2
Author:
Daniel Meyer
